title: New Build Apartments Torrevieja City Centre From €158,000
excerpt: Edificio Vento brings 10 exclusive new build apartments to central Torrevieja. 1-3 bed options from €158,000 with penthouses featuring private rooftop pools and solariums from €412,000.
metaDescription: Edificio Vento: 10 new build apartments in central Torrevieja from €158,000. 1-3 bed units and penthouses with private pools from €412,000. Floor plans, prices, specs — all details.
author: New Build Homes Costa Blanca

content.quickAnswer: Edificio Vento is a boutique building of 10 exclusive new build apartments in central Torrevieja, Alicante. Prices start at €158,000 for a one-bedroom ground-floor unit and reach €488,000 for a three-bedroom duplex penthouse with private rooftop pool, solarium, and outdoor kitchen. Located on a corner plot at Calle San Pablo nº 3 and Calle Gabriel Miró, the building is a 10-minute walk from Playa del Cura beach. Built by [AVKR HOMES](/builders/avkr-homes), a developer active across the Costa Blanca. All prices as of March 2026, sourced from the developer's official availability sheet.
content.intro:
**Edificio Vento** is one of the few new build opportunities in Torrevieja's walkable city centre. The building sits on a corner plot at Calle San Pablo and Calle Gabriel Miró with east-south orientation, delivering natural light all day and cross ventilation throughout. Prices start at **€158,000** for a one-bedroom and penthouses with **private rooftop pools** start at **€412,000**.

![Edificio Vento exterior render — corner plot in central Torrevieja](/images/blog/edificio-vento/edificio-vento-exterior.png)

It is a genuinely walk-everywhere location. The beach is a 10-minute walk. Shops, restaurants, and healthcare are all on foot. For buyers comparing [new build vs resale options](/blog/new-build-vs-resale-spain), Edificio Vento offers modern construction at competitive city-centre pricing. The developer, [AVKR HOMES](/builders/avkr-homes), is also behind the [Samar Villas](/properties?development=SAMAR+VILLAS) project on the Orihuela Costa.

sections.title: Why This Location Matters
sections.content:
Most Costa Blanca new builds sit on the outskirts of towns. Edificio Vento breaks that pattern. It occupies a **prime corner plot** in the heart of [Torrevieja](/areas/torrevieja).

The east-south orientation floods apartments with daylight. Every unit is exterior-facing, so cross ventilation is built in. In the warm Alicante climate, that matters.

Only 10 units share the building. Three standard floors, a ground floor, and two penthouse levels. It feels more like a private residence than a block. The design favours clean lines, premium facade cladding, and full-height glazing.

sections.title: One-Bedroom Apartments (Type A)
sections.content:
Compact and efficient. Ideal for couples, singles, or rental investors. [Request availability and floor plans](/contact).

**Ground floor** — 48.12 m² — **€158,000.** Street-level access, no terrace. The most affordable unit in the building.

**First floor** — 53.72 m² plus 4.28 m² terrace — **€170,000.**

**Second floor** — same layout, 58.39 m² total — **€178,000.**

**Third floor** — same layout, 58.39 m² total — **€182,000.**

Each upper-floor unit includes a 10.22 m² bedroom, a 5.83 m² bathroom, and a 16.45 m² living-dining room. All have private terraces and a 7.33 m² kitchen.

![Edificio Vento floor plan overview — all unit types and layouts](/images/blog/edificio-vento/floorplan-overview.webp)

For more options in this price bracket, see our guide to [new build apartments under €200k on the Costa Blanca](/blog/new-build-apartments-under-200k-costa-blanca).

sections.title: Two-Bedroom Apartments (Type B)
sections.content:
Suited for families, remote workers, or guest-room buyers. [Enquire about two-bedroom units](/contact).

**Ground floor** — 59.92 m² — **€183,000.**

**First floor** — 79.72 m² plus 9.41 m² terrace (89.13 m² total) — **€245,000.**

**Second floor** — same layout, 89.13 m² total — **€255,000.**

**Third floor** — same layout, 89.13 m² total — **€265,000.**

![Type B two-bedroom floor plan — 89 m² with two bedrooms and open-plan living](/images/blog/edificio-vento/floorplan-type-b-2bed.webp)

The layout includes two bedrooms (10.22 m² and 8.14 m²) and a bathroom. The open-plan living, dining, and kitchen area measures 21.76 m².

sections.title: Penthouse A — Two-Bedroom Duplex With Solarium
sections.content:
This is where Edificio Vento enters a different league. **172.52 m² across three levels** for **€412,000**. [Book a viewing of this penthouse](/contact).

**Floor 4:** Two bedrooms, two bathrooms, a terrace, and an internal staircase up.

**Floor 5:** A 24.26 m² living-kitchen area, a guest toilet, and a 20.48 m² terrace.

**Rooftop solarium:** Approximately 55 m² with a **private pool** and **outdoor kitchen**. Sunset views over the Mediterranean come as standard.

![Edificio Vento at night — illuminated facade and rooftop solariums](/images/blog/edificio-vento/edificio-vento-night.png)

sections.title: Penthouse B — Three-Bedroom Duplex With Solarium
sections.content:
The flagship unit. **220.49 m² of total living space** for **€488,000**.

**Floor 4** (89.13 m²): Three bedrooms, two bathrooms, a laundry room, and multiple terraces.

**Floor 5** (86.18 m²): A 28.27 m² living-kitchen, a guest toilet, and a 38.23 m² terrace.

**Rooftop solarium** (45.18 m²): Private pool and outdoor kitchen. For a three-bedroom penthouse with a pool in a city centre, **€488,000** is competitive on the Costa Blanca. Compare this to our wider list of [luxury new builds above €500k](/blog/luxury-new-build-villas-costa-blanca-500k-plus).

sections.title: Build Quality and Specifications
sections.content:
Materials are sourced from established Spanish and European manufacturers. Specifications are drawn from the developer's official quality memorandum, dated 2026.

**Structure.** Reinforced concrete slab foundation. Double hollow brick walls with thermal and acoustic insulation.

**Flooring.** Porcelain stoneware by **Saloni**, a leading Spanish tile manufacturer (est. 1971, Castellón). Hard-wearing and low-maintenance.

**Windows.** Aluminium frames with thermal bridge break technology. **Climalit double glazing** for sound and heat insulation.

**Climate control.** Electric underfloor heating in all bathrooms. Pre-installation for ducted AC throughout every apartment.

**Bathrooms.** **Roca** sanitaryware (Gap model). **Teka** faucets (Formentera range). **Blanco Lafuente** vanity units (Vera collection, 80 cm and 60 cm).

**Interior finishes.** False ceilings with recessed lighting. Decorative coving throughout.

**Security.** Armoured entrance doors to every unit. Built-in wardrobes with lacquered DM finishes. Learn more about [builder warranties in Spain](/blog/builder-warranty-spain-10-year) — new builds carry a 10-year structural guarantee by law.

sections.title: Location: Walking Distance to Everything
sections.content:
Edificio Vento sits at the intersection of Calle San Pablo and Calle Gabriel Miró in **central Torrevieja**. No car needed for daily life.

**Beaches.** Playa del Cura is roughly a 10-minute walk (per Google Maps, 800 m). Los Locos beach is equally close heading south.

**Day trips.** La Mata and Cala Ferrís offer variety without a car. Both are under 15 minutes by local bus.

**Daily life.** Mercadona, Lidl, and Consum supermarkets are minutes away. The Mercado Municipal is nearby for fresh produce and fish.

**Healthcare.** Hospital Universitario de Torrevieja, a public hospital with English-speaking staff (per the Valencian Health Service), serves the area.

**Leisure.** Real Club Náutico marina. Torrevieja Sports City (Olympic-standard facilities). Golf at [Villamartín](/blog/villamartin-golf-property-guide), [Las Ramblas](/blog/las-ramblas-golf-property), and [Campoamor](/blog/campoamor-golf-property) — all within 15 minutes by car.

**Transport.** Alicante-Elche Airport: approximately 45 minutes by car (55 km via AP-7). The AP-7 and N-332 motorways connect to [Alicante city](/areas/alicante) and Cartagena. See our [Alicante airport routes guide](/blog/alicante-airport-routes-2026) for current direct flights.

sections.title: Edificio Vento Price Summary
sections.content:
All prices as of March 2026, per the developer's official availability sheet. Subject to change.

![Edificio Vento unit availability and pricing overview](/images/blog/edificio-vento/edificio-vento-apartments-overview.webp)

**Ground floor:** Type A (1-bed, 48 m²) €158,000. Type B (2-bed, 60 m²) €183,000.

**First floor:** Type A (1-bed, 58 m²) €170,000. Type B (2-bed, 89 m²) €245,000.

**Second floor:** Type A (1-bed, 58 m²) €178,000. Type B (2-bed, 89 m²) €255,000.

**Third floor:** Type A (1-bed, 58 m²) €182,000. Type B (2-bed, 89 m²) €265,000.

**Penthouse A** (2-bed duplex, 173 m²) €412,000. **Penthouse B** (3-bed duplex, 220 m²) €488,000.

Use our [Spain property costs calculator](/blog/spain-property-costs-calculator-2026) to estimate total buying costs including taxes and fees. [Contact us](/contact) for live unit status and availability updates.

sections.title: Who Is Edificio Vento For?
sections.content:
**Holiday home buyers.** A central base for summer stays — no car needed. Walk to the beach and dine out on foot.

**Retirees and expats.** Modern and energy-efficient, close to healthcare and social life. The building's small scale creates a quiet home. Read our guide on [British healthcare in Spain](/blog/british-healthcare-spain-guide).

**Investors.** One-beds from €158,000 in a walkable centre with year-round rental demand. See our [rental yields by town](/blog/rental-yields-costa-blanca-towns) for benchmarks.

**Scandinavian and Northern European buyers.** Reliable climate and low cost of living. Direct budget flights from Stockholm, Oslo, and Manchester serve Alicante-Elche Airport. Check our [cost of living guide](/blog/cost-of-living-costa-blanca) for monthly figures.

![Torrevieja sunset views from central Torrevieja — what residents enjoy daily](/images/blog/edificio-vento/edificio-vento-sunset.png)

sections.title: How to Buy at Edificio Vento
sections.content:
You will need a **NIE** (foreigner ID number) before signing contracts. For a full walkthrough, see our [NIE number guide](/blog/nie-number-spain-guide) and [guide to buying property in Spain](/blog/buying-property-spain-process).

The typical process has four steps:

1. **Reservation** — Deposit of €3,000–€6,000 to secure your unit.
2. **Private purchase contract** — 30% deposit of the purchase price.
3. **Construction milestones** — Stage payments tied to build progress. See our [stage payments guide](/blog/stage-payments-off-plan-spain).
4. **Completion** — Final payment and signing the escritura before a notary.

We recommend an **independent Spanish property lawyer** to review all contracts on your behalf. Read our [Spanish property lawyer guide](/blog/spanish-property-lawyer-guide) for what to expect.

content.conclusion: Edificio Vento is a rare find — a **new build in a walkable city centre** at prices starting from €158,000. The 10-unit building combines a prime Torrevieja location with modern construction, premium specifications, and penthouse options with private rooftop pools. Whether you are buying a holiday home, a permanent residence, or a rental investment, the combination of location, build quality, and price range makes this development worth serious consideration. Units are limited and selling. [Contact us](/contact) for the latest availability and to arrange a viewing.

faqs.question: What is the cheapest apartment in Edificio Vento Torrevieja?
faqs.answer: The ground-floor one-bedroom at €158,000 for 48.12 m², as of March 2026.

faqs.question: Does Edificio Vento have penthouses with private pools?
faqs.answer: Yes. Penthouse A (2-bed, 172.52 m², €412,000) and Penthouse B (3-bed, 220.49 m², €488,000) both include private rooftop pools, solariums, and outdoor kitchens.

faqs.question: Where exactly is Edificio Vento?
faqs.answer: Calle San Pablo nº 3, central Torrevieja, Alicante. Corner plot at the intersection with Calle Gabriel Miró. Approximately 800 m from Playa del Cura.

faqs.question: How many apartments are in Edificio Vento?
faqs.answer: 10 exclusive units across four floor types. One-bed and two-bed on floors GF–3, plus two duplex penthouses.

faqs.question: Who is the developer of Edificio Vento?
faqs.answer: AVKR HOMES, a Costa Blanca developer also behind the Samar Villas project in Las Filipinas, Orihuela Costa.

faqs.question: What are the build specifications?
faqs.answer: Reinforced concrete, Climalit double glazing, Saloni porcelain flooring, Roca sanitaryware, underfloor heating in bathrooms, and pre-installation for ducted AC.

faqs.question: Can non-residents get a mortgage to buy at Edificio Vento?
faqs.answer: Yes. Spanish banks typically offer 60–70% financing for non-residents (as per Bank of Spain guidelines). A specialist mortgage broker can help.

faqs.question: What are the total buying costs on top of the price?
faqs.answer: Expect 12–14% on top of the purchase price for new builds. This covers 10% IVA (VAT), 1.5% stamp duty (AJD), notary fees, registry fees, and legal fees.

data.name: Edificio Vento
data.description: Boutique new build residential building of 10 exclusive apartments in central Torrevieja, Alicante. 1-3 bedroom apartments and penthouses with private rooftop pools.
